title: Tokens are not authenticating
excerpt: Wondering if API or token generation is healthy? Receiving “Not Authenticated” message in Postman with simple queries. Have refreshed my token several times and tried each. No token will authenticate. Am using https://ap…

posts.author: deceiver08 (Devin Doring)
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if API or token generation is healthy? Receiving “Not Authenticated” message in Postman with simple queries. Have refreshed my token several times and tried each. No token will authenticate. Am using https://api.monday.com/v2

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @deceiver08

Thanks for reaching out! That definitely sounds odd. Just to make sure we’re on the same page here, are you sending your request as a POST, and is the body formatted as JSON? I would also love to take a look at how you’re sending your API token to authenticate in Postman, some screenshots would be really helpful to understand the way this is set up on your end.

-Alex

posts.author: deceiver08 (Devin Doring)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlexSavchuk. Yes it is POST. I tried sporadically throughout the day yesterday and got nothing. For the heck of it, I just submitted this morning and went through fine! I changed literally nothing. Very weird!

image1368×910 30.1 KB

posts.author: deceiver08 (Devin Doring)
posts.cookedHtml: How long do tokens last before they expire?

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@deceiver08

That’s really odd, but I’m glad to hear that it seems to be working well now! As far as I know, API v2 tokens will be active as long as you don’t revoke the token on your end in the Monday UI’s Admin section, like so:

image960×428 41.7 KB

I hope that helps!

-Alex

posts.author: mmihalik (Michael Mihalik)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having this same issue this morning. I even regenerated my token and still does not work.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mmihalik

I’m sorry to hear you are having a similar experience here - would you mind reaching out to us at support@monday.com so that we can troubleshoot this further? I’d love to get a bit more information from you so that we can investigate more closely - screenshots of the way this is set up on your end and the results you are currently getting would be great.

-Alex
